courseGroups.name: Discipline Courses - Lists A and B
courseGroups.ruleText: Complete eight taught courses (48 credits), including at least three courses (18 credits) from List A. No more than three courses (18 credits) may be approved external electives. The List A minimum and external-elective approvals require manual audit review.

courses.name: Maintenance and management of building facilities
Natural and hybrid ventilation of buildings
Clean electrical energy and smart-grids for buildings

courseGroups.name: Capstone Experience
courseGroups.ruleText: Complete MEBS6023 Dissertation (24 credits). Its prerequisite requires two specified List A courses; the co-requisite exception for full-time Year 1 students requires manual audit review.

courseGroups.name: Discipline Courses - Official Groups A to D
courseGroups.ruleText: Complete at least 36 discipline-course credits from official Groups A to D, including at least 24 credits (four courses) in the Environmental Engineering subject group. Complete eight taught courses (48 credits) in total; no more than 12 credits may be approved external electives.

courseGroups.name: Capstone Experience
courseGroups.ruleText: Complete CIVL7009 Dissertation (24 credits) in the Environmental Engineering area. The dissertation-area requirement requires manual audit review.

courseGroups.name: Discipline Courses - Official Groups A to D
courseGroups.ruleText: Complete at least 36 discipline-course credits from official Groups A to D. Complete eight taught courses (48 credits) in total; no more than 12 credits may be approved external electives. General Stream students may take no more than four construction-management courses marked in Group A.

courseGroups.ruleText: Complete at least 36 discipline-course credits from official Groups A to D, including at least 24 credits (four courses) in the Structural Engineering subject group. courseGroups.name: Discipline Courses - Communications Engineering Stream
courseGroups.ruleText: For the Project path, complete at least 36 credits from official Group B Communications Engineering; up to 24 credits may be approved electives. For the Dissertation path, complete at least 30 credits from official Group B Communications Engineering; up to 18 credits may be approved electives. The path-dependent minimum and external approvals require manual audit review.

courses.name: Advanced topics in communication theory and systems
Advanced topics in multimedia signals and systems
Advanced satellite engineering and new space economy

courseGroups.name: Capstone Experience
courseGroups.ruleText: Complete either ELEC7022 Project (12 credits) with ten taught courses, or ELEC7021 Dissertation (24 credits) with eight taught courses. ELEC7023 Capstone Workshop (0 credits) is also compulsory. The mutually exclusive paths require manual audit review.

courseGroups.name: Professional Development
courseGroups.ruleText: ELEC7900 is optional and does not count toward the curriculum requirements or degree classification.

courseGroups.name: Discipline Courses - General Stream
courseGroups.ruleText: For the Project path, complete at least 36 credits from official Groups A, B or C; up to 24 credits may be approved electives. For the Dissertation path, complete at least 30 credits from official Groups A, B or C; up to 18 credits may be approved electives. The path-dependent minimum and external approvals require manual audit review.

courseGroups.name: Discipline Courses - Power Engineering Stream

For the Dissertation path, complete at least 30 credits from official Group C Power Engineering; up to 18 credits may be approved electives. The path-dependent minimum and external approvals require manual audit review.
